title: Pulse — Health & Wellness App
description: A cross-platform mobile app for tracking workouts, nutrition, and mental wellness with real-time data sync.

title: Finova — Fintech Dashboard
description: A comprehensive financial analytics dashboard with live market data, portfolio tracking, and predictive insights.

title: Verdant — E-commerce Platform
description: A sustainable goods marketplace with AI-powered product recommendations and carbon footprint tracking.

title: Arcana — Brand Identity System
description: Full visual identity system for a luxury lifestyle brand — logo, typography, color system, and brand guidelines.

title: Podfast — Podcast Platform
description: A modern podcast streaming platform with AI-generated transcripts, chapter markers, and social sharing.

title: Hive — Team Collaboration Tool
description: Real-time team workspace with Kanban boards, video calls, document editing, and workflow automation.
